blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 13".
